description_long: This object consists of a flat, rectangular computer monitor with a thick, solid black bezel and a matching rectangular base, accompanied by a separate tower-style computer case. The monitor's front is featureless and dark, with a wide bezel and a sturdy, blocky stand. The rear of the monitor features a simple circular red marking, possibly decorative or indicative of a vent or logo. The computer tower is boxy and black, with colorful wavy lines (red, green, blue) on its visible sides, suggesting stylized venting or decorative elements. The materials appear to be primarily matte plastic, with a hard, smooth finish. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible buttons, ports, or branding on the monitor's front or sides.
description: A black, rectangular computer monitor with a thick bezel and blocky stand, paired with a tower case featuring colorful wavy lines. The design is simple and utilitarian, with a matte plastic finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the monitor's wide, flat screen and thick bezel, with the tower case beside it displaying colorful wavy lines.
description_view_1: Side view of the tower case highlights the colorful wavy lines, while the monitor's stand is visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view of the tower case shows a single red wavy line, and the back of the monitor is visible with a circular red marking.
description_view_3: Back view of the monitor reveals a circular red marking, with the keyboard and stand visible; the tower case is not prominent.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, flat, and solid black with sharp corners and no visible texture or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian appearance.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a rectangular, blocky pedestal with a wide, flat base, made of the same matte black material as the bezel, and shows no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
